/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gltron.dir/src/gltron.c.o -o gltron  src/game/libgame.a src/input/libinput.a src/audio/libaudio.a src/video/libvideo.a src/configuration/libconfiguration.a src/base/libbase.a src/filesystem/libfilesystem.a nebu/input/libnebu_input.a nebu/audio/libnebu_audio.a nebu/video/libnebu_video.a nebu/scripting/libnebu_scripting.a nebu/filesystem/libnebu_filesystem.a nebu/base/libnebu_base.a lua5/liblua.a lua5/liblualib.a lib3ds/liblib3ds.a glew/libglew.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -lSDL2
